text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hello, I'm here to explain what training for the
Twinkle Star Climax will look like.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Would you like an explanation?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: What would you like me to explain?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'd like to know more about...
choice_data_list: That's all I need to know.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Ah yes, your career goals.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
You'll be training with the ultimate goal of
entering the TS Climax.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The first step is to enter races and earn Result
Points based on your performance. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
You'll need to earn a certain number of Result
Points each year, though the amount may differ
depending on the year.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
If you don't acquire enough Result Points by the
end of late December each year, your career will
come to an end!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Placing well in higher graded races will earn you a
greater number of Result Points.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Additionally, you'll sometimes face particularly
strong opponents during races!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
These runners will appear as "rivals" on the race
entry screen.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
You can even acquire skill hints by defeating a
rival, so do your best to seize victory!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Furthermore, unlike what you may be used to,
this time there aren't any goals specific to each
individual Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
This means you can take on a wider variety of
races, including ones you couldn't enter before!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
You'll have to use your discretion to choose the
most suitable races for your trainee. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
During your career, you might catch new glimpses
of daily life at the academy. I'm sure that'll be
fun!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
That concludes my rundown of career goals. Is
there anything else you'd like to know?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: So you want to know about the TS Climax?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
If you earn the required number of Result Points
during each career interval, you'll be able to
enter the TS Climax.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Consisting of three successive races, the TS
Climax is a very special event for runners!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Victory Points are awarded after each race based
on placing, and the runner with the most points
across all three races is crowned the winner. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The lineup of runners entering each race will
remain the same, but they'll grow tougher as you
progress.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Train your runner for a chance to enter the TS
Climax, then vie to become Twinkle Top Star!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
That concludes my rundown of the TS Climax. Is
there anything else you'd like to know?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
So you want to know about the Pro Shop
accessible during your career?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
In addition to Result Points, races will reward you
with shop coins!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The better you place, the more shop coins you'll
earn. These coins can then be spent at the Pro
Shop. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The Pro Shop offers a variety of useful training
items in exchange for coins!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
These items can raise attributes, replenish
Energy, boost training effectiveness, and more!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Be sure to make the most of the Pro Shop as you
train your partner. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Please be aware that the Pro Shop is only
available after your trainee completes her
junior-year Make Debut race.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Also, don't forget that the lineup of training items
on sale will change after a certain amount of time.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
If there's an item you have your eye on, I
recommend you gather enough shop coins to get
it while you can.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Furthermore, sales are sometimes held at random
when the lineup changes, during which you can
obtain items at lower prices than usual!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I also hear that extra training items are sometimes
added to the shop after a race finishes.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
So make sure you check out the Pro Shop
whenever you get the chance. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
That concludes my rundown of the Pro Shop. Is
there anything else you'd like to know?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
So you want to know about the Best Umamusume
Awards?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The URA presents these awards to the
Umamusume judged to be the best in their
respective years.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
One outstanding runner each from junior, classic,
and senior years is chosen for these highly
prestigious honors.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Selection occurs at the end of December each
year, after the year's final races have concluded.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Recipients are chosen based on a variety of
factors, including race results and number of fans
for that year. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Make sure to train hard, make good use of
training items from the shop, and take on as many
races as you can!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
That concludes my rundown of the Best
Umamusume Awards. Is there anything else you'd
like to know?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Are you sure?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Very well! ♪ Just in case, I've prepared a summary
of everything you'll need to know.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
If you ever need a refresher, simply tap the "i"
button in the top left of the screen.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Well, I wish you the best of luck. I'll be cheering
you on!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Okay. Well, I wish you the best of luck. I'll be
cheering you on!
